reviews.review_title: Requires a separate account to use
reviews.review_description: First thing you see when launching is a mandatory account login for a third party app

Teledomica has completely transformed the way we approach design at Urbanjobs, elevating our process to an entirely new level. It's both inspiring and remarkably innovative. The seamless integration with Meta Quest enables us to experience our projects in real-time, making abstract concepts tangible for our clients. With Teledomica, pushing the boundaries of creativity has become an extraordinary journey for our entire team.

I loved using Teledomica for viewing and testing my 3d modelled furniture pieces in AR. It's a great tool for designers and their clients. 
Also, something that would elevate the use could be a meeting feature with multiple players. With this, I could conduct my design review meetings in here as well which would actually be amazing!

The app is easy to navigate, and the 3D models are high quality. I loved trying out new styles of furniture and also decorating my home with this. I love apps like these, and I would love to see more brands showcasing their products in it in the future.

One of the best apps that you can use without the controllers. Very intuitive and user friendly hand gestures. It allows users to save and see mutiple 3D objects in the same space. It can be a very efficient salesperson gadget. No more hassle to carry samples for your meetings!

It's incredibly useful for setting up the scene before film shoots. You can upload 3D models and see them as if they were real in just seconds. The interface is very intuitive, making it easier for us to make decisions about stage design.

The app has a wide range of applications, both professionally and academically. The increasing number of brands inside seems like it will make it much easier for architects and the general audience when selecting products for your space.
Definitely the best model viewer app on the store. Very intuitive and easy to use. Highly recommended for designers and architects.

Very impressive app. Objects download quickly, gestures are intuitive, and many useful and innovative features including the blue navigation/manipulation compass. I look forward to browsing brands using this app.

reviews.review_title: New standard for 3 D model viewers
reviews.review_description: Super intuitive, easy to navigate and acess 3D models. A must have to to view prototypes, designs and creations. Great for visualization and modelling for architects and designers
